lineage.Process: ExtractByMask D:\mygis\GeoAgent-Pro\result\Hs_idw.tif D:\mygis\data\海浪SWAN模式数据\掩膜多边形\MaskPolygon.shp D:\mygis\GeoAgent-Pro\result\Extract_Hs_idw1.tif INSIDE "115.107358093262 16.5124560546875 133.827358093262 40.8824560546875 GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]]"
